message:
fix(codegen+runtime): Add UnifiedInt.parseUnicode and fromFloat methods

UnifiedInt now has proper parsing and float conversion methods that:
- Parse strings using BigInt internally
- Convert floats using BigInt.fromFloat
- Auto-demote to i64 if the value fits

Updated codegen to use:
- runtime.UnifiedInt.parseUnicode instead of runtime.bigint.parseBigIntUnicode
- runtime.UnifiedInt.fromFloat instead of runtime.BigInt.fromFloat

This ensures type consistency when variables are typed as UnifiedInt.
